questions.question: Who is the main protagonist of Attack on Titan?
questions.explanation: Eren Yeager is the central protagonist who vows to eradicate the Titans after his home is destroyed.

questions.question: What are the names of the three defensive walls protecting humanity?
questions.explanation: Humanity is protected by Wall Maria (outer), Wall Rose (middle), and Wall Sina (inner).

questions.question: Which Titan power does Armin Arlert inherit?
questions.explanation: Armin inherits the Colossal Titan from Bertholdt Hoover after receiving the Titan injection.

questions.question: Who is Eren's adoptive sister and a top-ranked soldier in the 104th Training Corps?
questions.explanation: Mikasa Ackerman is Eren's adoptive sister, who is intensely protective of him and possesses legendary combat skills.

questions.question: What is the true identity of the Beast Titan?
questions.explanation: Zeke Yeager, Eren's half-brother, is the inheritor of the Beast Titan.
